questions.q: Who did President Trump nominate to be the new director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention on April 16, 2026?
According to the CDC in April 2026, which life-threatening virus that causes severe vomiting and diarrhea is currently surging at high levels in the U.S.?
Which cabinet official was heavily grilled by Congress on April 16, 2026, regarding his stance on vaccines and proposed cuts to the federal health budget?
In April 2026, President Trump was expected to sign an executive order urging increased research into which psychedelic substance?
A mid-April 2026 report released by Senate Democrats revealed that drugmakers raised prices on hundreds of medications despite past drug pricing deals brokered by which president?
